name: openclaw--skills--apple-media-officialpm
description: Discover and control Apple media/AirPlay devices (HomePod, Apple TV, AirPlay speakers) from macOS. Use when you want to scan for AirPlay devices, map names→IPs/IDs, pair/connect, and control playback/volume using pyatv (atvremote) and Airfoil. Use when this capability is needed.
